subcodes.first_line: O ye who have attained the threshold of God! Your felicitous fortune and blessed destiny made you the dayspring of the light of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بار یافته گان آستان یزدان نیک بختی و خجسته طالعی شما را مطلع نور هدی نمود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
